title: File:Princess_Cruise_Lines_Enchanted_Princess.jpg
description: The Enchanted Princess sitting at the dock. Not seeing anyone on deck I'm pretty sure they're not sailing right now, thank you covid! Never have taken a Princess Cruise but if the price is right I'd certainly consider them.
